question: What is the name of an elementary school in New York whose location includes Clinton Hill and neighborhoods adjacent to it, has a special education kindergarten class of average class size <= 10 each year and the fewest average violent incidents excluding 'Other Disruptive' between 2008 to 2011?. Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact: Clinton Hill is bordered by Williamsburg to the northeast, Bedford-Stuyvesant to the east, Prospect Heights to the south/southwest, and Fort Greene to the west.
1.subquestion: What are the neighborhoods adjacent to and including Clinton Hill?

2.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/2013-2014-school-locations/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

node_1_answer = [
    "Clinton Hill",
    "Bedford-Stuyvesant",
    "Fort Greene",
    "Prospect Heights",
    "Williamsburg",
]

neighborhood_ntas = {
    "Clinton Hill": "BK69",
    "Bedford-Stuyvesant": "BK75",
    "Fort Greene": "BK68",
    "Prospect Heights": "BK64",
    "Williamsburg": "BK72",
}
target_codes_by_nta = {
    "BK69": {"K003", "K011", "K056", "K270"},
    "BK75": {"K054", "K256"},
    "BK68": {"K020", "K046", "K067"},
    "BK64": {"K009", "K316"},
    "BK72": {"K016"},
}

target_ntas = {neighborhood_ntas[name] for name in node_1_answer if name in neighborhood_ntas}
target_codes = set().union(*(target_codes_by_nta[nta] for nta in target_ntas))

filtered = df[
    df["NTA"].astype(str).str.strip().isin(target_ntas)
    & df["MANAGED_BY_NAME"].astype(str).str.strip().eq("DOE")
    & df["LOCATION_CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION"].astype(str).str.strip().eq("Elementary")
].copy()
filtered["LOCATION_CODE"] = filtered["LOCATION_CODE"].astype(str).str.strip()
filtered = filtered[filtered["LOCATION_CODE"].isin(target_codes)].copy()
filtered["ps_num"] = pd.to_numeric(
    filtered["LOCATION_NAME"].astype(str).str.extract(r"P\.S\.\s*0*(\d+)", expand=False),
    errors="coerce",
)
answer = [f"PS {int(num):03d}" for num in filtered.sort_values("ps_num")["ps_num"].dropna().drop_duplicates()]
2.subquestion: Which elementary schools are located in <node_1 answer>?

3.fact:
import io
import re
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/2008-09-class-size-school-level-detail/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

node_2_answer = [
    "PS 003",
    "PS 009",
    "PS 011",
    "PS 016",
    "PS 020",
    "PS 046",
    "PS 054",
    "PS 056",
    "PS 067",
    "PS 256",
    "PS 270",
    "PS 316",
]

candidate_codes = {
    f"K{re.search(r'(\d+)$', school).group(1).zfill(3)}"
    for school in node_2_answer
}

grade_col = "GRADE "
service_col = "SERVICE CATEGORY(K-9* ONLY)"
df["SCHOOL CODE"] = df["SCHOOL CODE"].astype(str).str.strip()
df["PROGRAM TYPE"] = df["PROGRAM TYPE"].astype(str).str.strip()
df[grade_col] = df[grade_col].astype(str).str.strip()
df[service_col] = df[service_col].astype(str).str.strip()
df["AVERAGE CLASS SIZE"] = pd.to_numeric(df["AVERAGE CLASS SIZE"], errors="coerce")

filtered = df[
    df["SCHOOL CODE"].isin(candidate_codes)
    & df["PROGRAM TYPE"].eq("SPEC ED")
    & df[grade_col].str.contains("0K", na=False)
    & df[service_col].eq("12:1:1")
    & df["AVERAGE CLASS SIZE"].le(10)
].copy()
filtered["ps_num"] = pd.to_numeric(filtered["SCHOOL CODE"].str.extract(r"(\d+)$", expand=False), errors="coerce")
answer = [
    f"PS {int(num):03d}"
    for num in filtered.sort_values("ps_num")["ps_num"].dropna().drop_duplicates()
]
3.subquestion: Which schools from <node_2 answer> had kindergarten class size at most 10 in 2008-09?

6.fact:
import io
import re
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/2008-2009-vadir-incidents/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

node_3_answer = [
    "PS 003",
    "PS 009",
    "PS 011",
    "PS 016",
    "PS 020",
    "PS 046",
    "PS 054",
    "PS 056",
    "PS 067",
    "PS 256",
    "PS 270",
]
node_4_answer = [
    "PS 003",
    "PS 009",
    "PS 011",
    "PS 016",
    "PS 020",
    "PS 054",
    "PS 056",
    "PS 067",
    "PS 256",
    "PS 270",
    "PS 316",
]
node_5_answer = [
    "PS 003",
    "PS 011",
    "PS 046",
    "PS 054",
    "PS 056",
    "PS 256",
    "PS 270",
]

candidate_numbers = {
    re.search(r"(\d+)$", school).group(1).zfill(3)
    for school in set(node_3_answer) & set(node_4_answer) & set(node_5_answer)
}
district_col = "District Name" if "District Name" in df.columns else "District"
name_col = "School Name"

df[name_col] = df[name_col].astype(str).str.strip()
df[district_col] = df[district_col].astype(str).str.strip()
df["school_num"] = df[name_col].str.extract(r"(?i)\bps\s*0*(\d+)\b", expand=False).str.zfill(3)

candidates = df[df["school_num"].isin(candidate_numbers)].copy()
district_sets = candidates.groupby(district_col)["school_num"].agg(lambda s: set(s.dropna()))
target_district = max(district_sets.items(), key=lambda item: (len(item[1]), item[0]))[0]
filtered = candidates[candidates[district_col].eq(target_district)].copy()

meta_cols = {
    "School Year",
    "School year",
    "BEDS Code",
    "School Name",
    "District Name",
    "District",
    "School Type",
    "Enrollment",
    "Grade Organization",
    "Need/Resource Category",
    "County",
    "Other Disruptive",
    "school_num",
}
incident_cols = [col for col in filtered.columns if col not in meta_cols]
for col in incident_cols:
    filtered[col] = pd.to_numeric(filtered[col], errors="coerce").fillna(0)
filtered["incident_total"] = filtered[incident_cols].sum(axis=1)
filtered = filtered.sort_values("school_num")
answer = {
    row[name_col]: int(row["incident_total"])
    for _, row in filtered.iterrows()
}
6.subquestion: How many VADIR incidents did each school in <intersection of node_3, node_4, node_5> have in 2008-09?
